roblog v0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Check your post

rOpenSci: The roblog package

Are you preparing a blog post or tech note for rOpenSci, after getting the go-ahead and a tentative publication date from our community manager Stefanie Butland? Stay here! The goal of roblog is to provide practical helpers for authors of blog posts and tech notes on rOpenSci website.

Best paired with rOpenSci blog guidance.

Installation

remotes::install_github("ropenscilabs/roblog")

Links

  • Browse source code at
    https://​github.com/​ropenscilabs/​roblog/​
  • Report a bug at
    https://​github.com/​ropenscilabs/​roblog/​issues
